title: Create a notebook with all fields and confirm it appears in the Study list
description: Verifies a user can create a new notebook using name, specialty, description, icon, and color and then see it listed on /study.

steps.description: Type "Cardiología - Repaso" into the notebook name field
Type "Apuntes y preguntas de repaso para cardiología." into the description field
Click an icon option in the icon selector
Click a color option in the color selector

title: Create notebook and open it from the list (navigates to notebook view)
description: Verifies a newly created notebook can be opened from the /study list and the app navigates to the notebook view route.

steps.description: Type "Neurología - Casos" into the notebook name field
Click on the notebook named "Neurología - Casos" in the notebooks list

title: Validation: required notebook name prevents creation
description: Verifies the modal shows a validation message and stays open when notebook name is empty.

title: Create notebook with only required fields (minimal creation)
description: Verifies a notebook can be created when only the required fields are provided (at minimum, name).

steps.description: Type "Anatomía" into the notebook name field

title: Create notebook with long name and description (boundary input)
description: Verifies the UI can accept and display a notebook created with longer text inputs without breaking the flow.

steps.description: Type "Farmacología avanzada - Interacciones y efectos adversos (Repaso intensivo)" into the notebook name field
Type "Colección extensa de notas, mnemotecnias y preguntas de práctica para interacciones, contraindicaciones y efectos adversos frecuentes." into the description field

title: Specialty selection persists in modal before submission
description: Verifies selecting a specialty is reflected in the UI prior to creating the notebook.

steps.description: Type "Pediatría - Vacunas" into the notebook name field

title: Icon and color selection are applied before submission
description: Verifies that choosing an icon and a color updates the modal UI before creating the notebook.

steps.description: Click an icon option in the icon selector
Verify element "Selected icon preview" is visible
Click a color option in the color selector
Verify element "Selected color preview" is visible
Type "Medicina Interna" into the notebook name field

title: Validation recovery: show error then fix name and create successfully
description: Verifies the user can recover from a required-name validation error by entering a name and creating the notebook without leaving the modal.

steps.description: Type "Dermatología" into the notebook name field

title: Send a chat message and receive an AI response in notebook chat
description: Verifies a logged-in user can send a message in a notebook chat and see an AI response appear in the chat history.

steps.description: Click on the first visible notebook in the notebooks list
Type "Explain the difference between systolic and diastolic blood pressure." into the chat message input field
Verify element "AI response message" is visible

title: Send chat message using Send button (not Enter) and see it appear in history
description: Verifies sending a message via the Send button posts the user message and results in an AI reply in the chat history.

steps.description: Click on the first visible notebook in the notebooks list
Type "Summarize the mechanism of action of beta blockers." into the chat message input field
Verify text "Summarize the mechanism of action of beta blockers." is visible
Verify element "AI response message" is visible

title: Generate Flashcards from Studio Sidebar after receiving an AI response
description: Verifies the user can open Studio Sidebar Flashcards option and see flashcards generated for the current topic.

steps.description: Click on the first visible notebook in the notebooks list
Type "Create a concise explanation of Starling forces." into the chat message input field
Verify element "AI response message" is visible
Click the "Flashcards" option in the Studio Sidebar

title: Use Studio Sidebar Occlusion tool and confirm occlusion UI appears
description: Verifies the user can access the Occlusion studio tool from the sidebar and sees the occlusion generation UI or results area.

steps.description: Click on the first visible notebook in the notebooks list
Type "Explain the brachial plexus organization." into the chat message input field
Verify element "AI response message" is visible
Click the "Occlusion" option in the Studio Sidebar

title: Prevent empty message submission from chat input
description: Verifies the chat does not send an empty message and no new message appears in the chat history when the input is empty.

steps.description: Click on the first visible notebook in the notebooks list
Verify text "Could not reach AI service" is not visible

title: Long message submission renders correctly in chat history
description: Verifies a long user message can be submitted and is visible in the chat history without breaking the conversation view.

steps.description: Click on the first visible notebook in the notebooks list

Type "Please provide a detailed but structured explanation of the renin-angiotensin-aldosterone system, including triggers, key enzymes, receptors, downstream effects, and clinical correlations such as ACE inhibitors and ARBs." into the chat message input field

title: Start a clinical case and view the initial prompt/history
description: Verifies a user can start a clinical case from the Clinical Cases page and see the case prompt/history content.

steps.description: Click on "Clinical Cases" in the main navigation/menu

title: Complete a case by submitting an answer/diagnosis and receive feedback and score
description: Verifies submitting a diagnosis/answer produces structured feedback and a visible score/result.

steps.description: Click on "Clinical Cases" in the main navigation/menu
Type "Acute appendicitis" into the diagnosis/answer field

title: Generate related flashcards from case feedback
description: Verifies the user can trigger flashcard generation from within the case results/feedback area.

steps.description: Click on "Clinical Cases" in the main navigation/menu

title: Loading indicator appears when starting a case
description: Verifies a loading indicator is shown while the clinical case content is being fetched.

steps.description: Click on "Clinical Cases" in the main navigation/menu

title: Cannot submit empty diagnosis/answer (validation prevents submission)
description: Verifies the case interaction prevents submitting when the answer/diagnosis is empty and shows a visible validation cue.

steps.description: Click on "Clinical Cases" in the main navigation/menu

title: Create a new community post and see it appear in the feed
description: Verifies an authenticated user can publish a new post and see it visible in the community feed.

steps.description: Click on "Community" in the main navigation
Type "E2E Test Post Title" into the post title field
Type "This is an automated end-to-end test post body." into the post body field
Verify text "E2E Test Post Title" is visible

title: Attempt to publish a post with empty body shows validation error
description: Verifies the post editor prevents publishing when the post body is empty and displays the expected validation message.

steps.description: Click on "Community" in the main navigation
Type "Post Missing Body" into the post title field

title: Cancel out of New Post returns to the community feed without publishing
description: Verifies a user can exit the post editor and return to the community feed without creating a post.

steps.description: Click on "Community" in the main navigation

title: Community feed loads and shows core UI elements for browsing
description: Verifies the community feed page loads for an authenticated user and presents baseline browsing UI.

steps.description: Click on "Community" in the main navigation

title: Prevent duplicate submissions by clicking Publish twice quickly
description: Verifies the UI does not create an obvious duplicate post when Publish is clicked multiple times in quick succession.

steps.description: Click on "Community" in the main navigation
Type "No Duplicate Publish" into the post title field
Type "Checking that repeated publish does not obviously duplicate the post." into the post body field
Verify text "No Duplicate Publish" is visible

title: Validation message clears after adding missing content and publishing successfully
description: Verifies that after a 'Content required' error, adding body content allows publishing and the user can see the post in the feed.

steps.description: Click on "Community" in the main navigation
Type "Fix Missing Content" into the post title field
Type "Now the content is present so publish should succeed." into the post body field
Verify text "Fix Missing Content" is visible

title: Generate and play focus music starts playback and timer
description: Verifies a user can generate/play focus music and sees the focus UI with a running timer.

steps.description: Click on "Music" in the main navigation/menu

title: Select duration and style then generate/play shows active session UI
description: Verifies selecting a duration and style and pressing Generate/Play transitions into an active focus session UI.

steps.description: Click on "Music" in the main navigation/menu
Select "25 minutes" from the duration dropdown

title: Playback begins: timer starts and focus UI is visible
description: Verifies that after generating/playing, the page indicates music is playing and the session timer is running.

steps.description: Click on "Music" in the main navigation/menu
Select "10 minutes" from the duration dropdown

title: Visual focus UI remains visible while music plays
description: Verifies that the focus session screen remains visible during playback and provides a clear in-session state.

steps.description: Click on "Music" in the main navigation/menu
Select "15 minutes" from the duration dropdown

title: Change duration and style controls are available before starting session
description: Verifies the user can see and use both duration and style controls prior to starting playback.

steps.description: Click on "Music" in the main navigation/menu
Select "30 minutes" from the duration dropdown

title: Generate/Play button is present and visible on /music landing state
description: Verifies the primary call-to-action to generate/play is visible on the Music page before any session starts.

steps.description: Click on "Music" in the main navigation/menu

title: Save settings after enabling Offline Sync
description: Verifies a user can enable Offline Sync and successfully save settings with a visible confirmation.

steps.description: Click the "Settings" link or menu item
Click the "Offline sync" toggle to turn it on

title: Offline Sync toggle state is retained after saving and revisiting Settings
description: Verifies the Offline Sync preference remains enabled after saving and returning to the Settings page.

steps.description: Click the "Settings" link or menu item
Click the "Offline sync" toggle to turn it on
Click the "Study" link or app logo/home navigation to leave Settings
Click the "Settings" link or menu item
Verify the "Offline sync" toggle indicates it is enabled

title: Inline validation shown for invalid email format on Save
description: Verifies invalid email format is rejected with an inline validation error and saving is prevented.

steps.description: Click the "Settings" link or menu item

title: Invalid email does not show success confirmation
description: Verifies that when an invalid email is entered, the success message is not shown (save is blocked).

steps.description: Click the "Settings" link or menu item
Verify text "Settings saved" is not visible

title: Correcting invalid email removes inline error
description: Verifies the email validation error clears after replacing invalid input with a valid-looking email format.

steps.description: Click the "Settings" link or menu item
Verify text "Invalid email" is not visible

title: Save button works for a non-email preference change (smoke)
description: Verifies saving works when changing a preference (e.g., Offline Sync) without modifying profile fields.

steps.description: Click the "Settings" link or menu item
Click the "Offline sync" toggle to change its state

title: Settings page loads and displays key sections
description: Verifies the Settings page is reachable and shows core controls like Save and Offline Sync.

steps.description: Click the "Settings" link or menu item
